result: Exact-head typecheck and 234 runtime tests accepted the current API matrix, current two-form context breach, Scope.run dependency behavior, primitive and extension context boundaries, and explicit cleanup parameters. The proposed ctx.exec dependency contract, shared exported type, extension target migration, exact call-site count, and wall gate remain rejected.

rejected.reason: contradicted by current types and runtime and non-replayable without scripts/check-inline-exec-contract.mjs
unsupported as the unique source-forced replacement contract
active walls are breached, blocked, or lack fresh held replay traces

wall_gate.reason: Only reducing discovery facts are accepted. Implementation needs an orchestrator decision on the exact target contract, a defined extension target, and a deterministic contract checker before its completion can be accepted.

commanded_lines: Action envelope: read-only validation; write only workers/validator-dkr-a/verification.v1.json and progress.finish.json; no product, git, frame, tree, ledger, release, or external-state changes.
Validation decision: accept current-contract discovery facts only; reject unsupported API preferences and non-replayable target-contract claims; keep downstream implementation blocked.
DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
